positive: Minimalist abstract illustration of a friendly, smiling solar system composed of stylized planets and stars. Earth is a vibrant blue and green sphere, surrounded by rings of gold and cosmic dust. Planets are simple, smooth geometric shapes with gentle gradients and pastel colors, connected by delicate, looping orbits. Incorporate a crescent moon and stylized comets. The overall composition should be centered, highly symmetrical, and suitable for a single, striking print on t-shirts or tote bags. Style: Flat design, vector art aesthetics, clean lines, high contrast silhouette elements against a subtle, deep midnight blue background. Lighting: Even, diffuse lighting to highlight the shapes. Color palette: Deep blues, vibrant teal, pastel yellows, and pops of cyan. Intricate details: Small, scattered constellations and geometric patterns surrounding the main celestial bodies.
